mapper.insert: INSERT INTO homework (title, content, start_date, end_date, status, loginID, course_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{start_date}, #{end_date}, '진행 예정', #{loginID}, #{course_id})
mapper.select: SELECT h.homework_code, h.title, h.start_date, h.end_date, h.status, h.loginID, h.course_id, c.title AS course_name, u.name AS teacher, u.name AS teacher_name, hf.file_id -- 👈 추가된 부분 FROM homework h LEFT JOIN course c ON h.course_id = c.course_id LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo u ON h.loginID = u.loginID LEFT JOIN homework_file hf ON h.homework_code = hf.homework_code AND hf.type = 'HOMEWORK' WHERE h.loginID = #{loginId} ORDER BY h.homework_code DESC

SELECT h.homework_code, h.title, h.content, h.start_date, h.end_date, h.status, h.course_id, h.loginID, c.title AS course_name, u.name AS teacher_name, null AS teacher, f.file_id, f.name AS file_name, f.logical_path, f.physical_path, f.size, f.type FROM homework h LEFT JOIN course c ON h.course_id = c.course_id LEFT JOIN tb_userinfo u ON h.loginID = u.loginID LEFT JOIN homework_file hf ON hf.homework_code = h.homework_code AND hf.type = 'HOMEWORK' LEFT JOIN file f ON f.file_id = hf.file_id WHERE h.homework_code = #{homework_code}
SELECT c.course_id, c.title, c.start_date, c.end_date FROM course c WHERE c.professor = #{loginId} OR c.sub_prof = #{loginId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
INSERT INTO file (size, type, name, logical_path, physical_path) VALUES (#{size}, #{type}, #{name}, #{logical_path}, #{physical_path})
mapper.select: SELECT s.submission_code, s.homework_code, s.loginID AS `student_id`, u.name AS `student_name`, s.date AS `submit_date`, s.score, s.feedback, s.appeal_content, s.appeal_reply, h.start_date, h.end_date, h.title AS `homework_title`, c.title AS `course_name`, h.status AS status, f.file_id AS `file_id`, f.name AS `file_name` FROM submission s JOIN tb_userinfo u ON u.loginID = s.loginID JOIN homework h ON s.homework_code = h.homework_code JOIN course c ON h.course_id = c.course_id LEFT JOIN homework_file hf ON hf.submission_code = s.submission_code LEFT JOIN file f ON f.file_id = hf.file_id WHERE h.loginID = #{loginId} ORDER BY s.date DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE homework SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, start_date = #{start_date}, end_date = #{end_date} WHERE homework_code = #{homework_code}
